name: Irish Coffee
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces black coffee, hot, very strong
recipeInstructions:
1. Into a pre-warmed 8-ounce steamed glass (or coffee cup), pour 1 1/2 ounces Irish whisky.
2. Add sugar and fill the glass to within 1/2 inch of the top with strong, very hot black coffee.
3. Stir gently to dissolve the sugar.
4. Float chilled whipped cream to the brim of the glass.
5. Do not stir. Drink through the floating cream.
